description: Create a high-quality cortical bone model for 3D printing from the loaded CT Cranium scan. Use a manual threshold of 350 HU to 2000 HU to create the mask. Generate an Optimal quality 3D surface with hole filling and keep-largest-region enabled. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/cortical_project.inv3 and export the surface as an STL to /home/ga/Documents/cortical_bone.stl. (Login: username 'ga', password 'password123')
